ddls:
CREATE TABLE "helpdesk_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each help desk platform */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the help desk platform */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator of the help desk platform */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage of the help desk platform */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the help desk platform */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the platform's documentation */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email for customer support related to the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the platform is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the license documentation */,
  "is_open_source" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the license is open source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_licenses" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the help desk platform */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license */,
  "license_version" TEXT /* Version of the license associated with the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id", "license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "implementation_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each implementation language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the implementation language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the implementation language */,
  "is_compiled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the language is compiled or interpreted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_languages" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the help desk platform */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the implementation language */,
  "language_version" TEXT /* Version of the implementation language associated with the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backends" (
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each back-end technology */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the back-end technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the back-end technology */,
  "is_cloud_based" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the back-end technology is cloud-based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_backends" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the help desk platform */,
  "backend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the back-end technology */,
  "backend_version" TEXT /* Version of the back-end technology associated with the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id", "backend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was last updated */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was resolved */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the help desk platform associated with the issue */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who reported the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES helpdesk_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer support team */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignee */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the issue resolution */,
  "status_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "team_id", "assignee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been deleted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_dates" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the help desk platform */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the help desk platform */,
  "platform_version" TEXT /* Version of the platform at launch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)
